Okay, so this isn't really a close, it's more of a tactical thing, but if you've already exhausted all of the stall closes and all of the wife closes, one of the, you know, this is just like, you want to exhaust all those closes before you do this because they listen. Like, I get you gotta think about it. I get you gotta talk to your husband. So let's do this. Let's get you signed up and we can just put the first payment for the start date. And that way between now and then you change your mind for whatever reason. You know, you didn't get billed anything, you just let us know. And this way at least, like, you have a spot and you're in and like the likelihood that you actually do the program is much higher if you just take that small step. And so that will actually help close a lot of those, like, I need to think about as people because like they feel like they just delayed the decision one more time, but usually if the default is a yes, they're much more likely to do it. Now this is what you do at the end. This is if you already exhausted all those things, but the delay payment closes does work.
